rubric_items.reasoning: The agent fully completed the task. It deployed a 3-node Elasticsearch cluster using only native Kubernetes resources (ConfigMap, headless Service, ClusterIP Service, PodDisruptionBudget, StatefulSet) with the correct image (elasticsearch:8.11.1). All 3 pods reached Ready (1/1) status. The cluster health endpoint returned green with 3 nodes via the required es-http Service over HTTPS on port 9200. A document write returned result='created' and the subsequent read returned found=true, confirming both operations work. The stage oracle verdict is pass. The regression sweep failure on stage_01 (showing 5 nodes instead of 3) reflects state after the subsequent scale-up stage ran, not a failure of this stage's work.
